checks.notReachedEnd: You didn't reach the end of the maze.
checks.walkNotDefined: You should define a walk function that takes a number of steps and moves forward that many times.

writeWalk.name: Write a walk function
writeWalk.description: Define a function called walk that takes a number of steps as its input and moves forward that many times.

maze1.name: Navigate the maze
maze1.description: Walk 3, turn left, walk 2, turn right, walk 4 to reach the target.

howToMoveSpecificTimes.question: How do I move forward a specific number of times?
howToMoveSpecificTimes.answer: You have solved other exercises where you had to do something a specific number of times (think back to making the golf ball roll a specific distance). Use the same ideas here.

move.description: Moves the character **one step forward** in the current direction. The character will only move if the target position is not blocked by a wall.

turnLeft.description: Turns the character **90 degrees to the left** (counterclockwise). This changes the direction the character is facing.

turnRight.description: Turns the character **90 degrees to the right** (clockwise). This changes the direction the character is facing.
